Package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.machine

Class Furnace

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.machine.Machine
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.machine.Furnace
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyHolder<FurnaceProperties>, ConfigurationSerializable, InventoryHolder
public class Furnace extends Machine implements PropertyHolder<FurnaceProperties>, ConfigurationSerializable
Virtual furnace object

  • Constructor Details

    • Furnace

      public Furnace(String name)
      Create a new furnace object

      NOTE: Creating a furnace object using this method will not tick the furnace.

      It is recommended to use FurnaceManager.createFurnace(String)

      NOTE: The properties used for this furnace will be FurnaceProperties.FURNACE

      Parameters:
      name - Name of the object which will show up in the UI

    • Furnace

      public Furnace(String name, FurnaceProperties furnaceProperties)
      Create a new furnace object

      NOTE: Creating a furnace object using this method will not tick the furnace.

      It is recommended to use FurnaceManager.createFurnace(String)

      Parameters:
      name - Name of the object which will show up in the UI
      furnaceProperties - Property for this furnace

  • Method Details

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Set the name of this furnace

      This will force close all open inventory views.

      Overrides:
      setName in class Machine
      Parameters:
      name - new name

    • extractExperience

      public float extractExperience()
      Get the current experience stored in this furnace

      This will also reset the current experience back to 0.0

      Returns:
      Current experience stored in this furnace

    • openInventory

      public void openInventory(Player player)
      Open this furnace's inventory to a player
      Specified by:
      openInventory in class Machine
      Parameters:
      player - Player to open inventory to

    • tick

      public void tick()
      Tick this furnace

      This will process the fuel, cook the input item and update the inventory

      Overrides:
      tick in class Machine
